title: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Result 2026 declared for MA Education 2nd Semester (NEP 24) on the official website - kkhsou.ac.in on 26-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University result.

content.text: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University has released the KKHSOU Result 2026 for the MA Education 2nd Semester (NEP 2024) examination held in November 2025 for the latest batch of postgraduate learners. The university has published a detailed result notice for MA Education on its official website in the results/news section, allowing students to access their updated semester wise performance online. KKHSOU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - kkhsou.ac.in.

Students can open the MA Education II Semester NEP 24 result page, access the attached PDF or e-marksheet link and then use their enrollment or roll number to check individual marks and pass status. After downloading their result, they should carefully verify their name, enrollment number, course title, paper wise marks and overall outcome, and contact KKHSOU or their study centre immediately if any discrepancy is noticed.

sections.heading: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: KKHSOU has added the “Result of the MA (Education) - II Semester (NEP 24)” to its list of recently declared NEP based postgraduate results for the November 2025 exam session. This release follows other MA II semester NEP 2024 results and provides clarity to MA Education students regarding their progression in the new curriculum structure.

sections.heading: Krishna Kanta Handiqui State Open University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: KKHSOU has provided a specific result notice page for MA Education II Semester (NEP 24), which hosts the official PDF or link to detailed marks. Students can access this page directly using the URL shared by the university and then follow the instructions there to view their individual results.

links.label: Result of the MA (Education) - II Semester (NEP 24)

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your KKHSOU MA Education 2nd Semester NEP 24 Result 2026:

items: Open the official result link https://kkhsou.ac.in/web/index_news_details.php?p=5476 in your browser.
On the result notice page, look for the attachment or link labelled with Result of the MA (Education) - II Semester (NEP 24).
Click on the attached PDF or result link to open the detailed result document.
If it is a PDF, press Ctrl+F and type your Enrollment Number / Roll Number / Name to quickly find your entry.
Check your paper wise marks, total marks, grade or SGPA (if shown) and overall result status (Pass/Fail/Back, etc.).
Download the PDF or take a printout of your result for future academic reference, re-registration and documentation.

structured_links.label: Result of the MA (Education) - II Semester (NEP 24)
